description: Golden dataset for pnpm eval:answers — measures the chatbot's full answers (the real streamChat pipeline: retrieval + rerank + Claude + tool use), not just retrieval ranking. `reference` is the ground-truth context the LLM judge scores correctness against (drawn from content/policies/*.md and the seed catalog); `mustMention` are robust key facts checked deterministically (case-insensitive substring) — keep them to near-verbatim tokens a correct answer will almost certainly contain. `expectsProductCard` asserts the pipeline surfaced at least one product card.

cases.question: What is your return policy?
cases.reference: Items can be returned within 7 days of delivery if defective, damaged, or different from what was ordered. Products must be unused, unwashed, and in original packaging with tags attached.

cases.question: Can I return socks or underwear?
cases.reference: For hygiene reasons, innerwear, socks, and pierced jewelry are not eligible for return or exchange.

cases.question: How long do refunds take?
cases.reference: Approved refunds are processed to the original payment method (or store credit) within 7–10 business days of receiving the returned item.

cases.question: Do you deliver outside Dhaka?
cases.reference: Aurevo ships nationwide within Bangladesh to all 64 districts. Inside Dhaka takes 2–3 working days, outside Dhaka 3–5, remote areas up to 7.

cases.question: How much does shipping cost?
cases.reference: Shipping cost is calculated at checkout based on the delivery district and shown before payment. Browsing and adding to cart is free.

cases.question: How can I track my order?
cases.reference: Once an order ships, a tracking number is added and visible on the order details page. Logged-in users view it in their account; guests use the guest order lookup with order number and email.

cases.question: Do you accept cash on delivery?
cases.reference: Cash on delivery is available on all orders — pay in cash when the order arrives. An online payment option is also available at checkout.

cases.question: Is my card information stored on your servers?
cases.reference: No payment card details are stored on Aurevo Fashion's own servers.

cases.question: Do you have a physical store I can visit?
cases.reference: Aurevo Fashion currently operates as an online-only store.

cases.question: Do I need an account to order?
cases.reference: No — guest checkout is available. Creating an account lets you save addresses and view order history.

cases.question: Can I cancel my order after placing it?
cases.reference: Contact us as soon as possible with your order number. Once an order has shipped it can no longer be changed or cancelled — a return can be requested instead once it arrives.

cases.question: I'm between two sizes, which should I pick?
cases.reference: If you're between two sizes, sizing generally runs true to standard measurements unless the product description says otherwise (e.g. 'runs small' or 'oversized fit').

cases.question: Do you have any Nike Vomero running shoes?
cases.reference: The catalog includes the Nike Vomero 18 running shoe, priced around BDT 2,550.

cases.question: Show me a Louis Vuitton Air Force 1.
cases.reference: The catalog includes Louis Vuitton x Nike Air Force 1 Low collaborations (e.g. the Monogram Brown Damier Azur, and a White/Blue version).

cases.question: What's the price of the Air Jordan 1 Black Toe?
cases.reference: The Nike Air Jordan 1 Retro Low OG 'Black Toe' is priced around BDT 2,450.
